𝗖𝗔𝗣𝟰𝗗 | Generating animatable 4D portrait avatars from input images.  🔥 Super Hot!

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Generating animatable 4D portrait avatars from input images.
📅 Created: Dec 2024 • Updated: Jun 2026

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Creation of animatable 4D portrait avatars
✅ Utilizes morphable multi-view diffusion models
✅ Supports generation from a few reference images
✅ Includes a real-time viewer for exported animations
✅ Provides scripts for quick start, inference, and custom inference


✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

⭐⭐⭐ 471 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 35 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 12 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

CAP4D is an official repository for creating animatable 4D portrait avatars from a few reference images using morphable multi-view diffusion models. It enables the generation of dynamic 3D avatars that can be animated and viewed in real-time.

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/felixtaubner/cap4d

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To automate and enhance communication for Telegram Business accounts by providing an AI assistant that can handle customer interactions, manage groups, and perform various utility tasks.
📅 Created: Jun 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ AI-powered responses (GPT-4.1-mini or fallback API)
✅ Token auto-rotation for GitHub API limits
✅ Aggressive and caring response modes
✅ Group administration commands (kick, ban, mute, spam protection)
✅ Utility functions (calculator, weather, translation, search)
✅ Telegram Business integration as a Personal Assistant


⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This Python repository provides a Telegram bot designed for Telegram Business accounts, acting as a personal AI assistant. It offers AI-powered responses, customizable interaction modes (business, aggressive, caring), and administrative tools for group management, alongside utility functions.

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗢𝗡𝗜𝗫-𝗔𝗧𝗘𝗥𝗡𝗢𝗦𝗕𝗢𝗧 | Keeping Minecraft servers, particularly those hosted on platforms like Aternos, online and active 24/7 by simulating an active player, controlled conveniently via Telegram.  🔍 Worth a Look

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Keeping Minecraft servers, particularly those hosted on platforms like Aternos, online and active 24/7 by simulating an active player, controlled conveniently via Telegram.
📅 Created: May 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Telegram-based menu for bot control (start, stop, logs, settings)
✅ Live configuration changes (address, port, version, nickname, password) without restart
✅ Automatic reconnection with configurable phases
✅ Multiple authentication modes for plugins like AuthMe
✅ Realistic or random nickname generation
✅ Smart AFK behavior with movement and camera rotation
✅ Anti-mob evasion
✅ Optional combat against weak mobs
✅ Ring buffer log displayed in Telegram


⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

⭐ 3 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 2 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

ONIX-AternosBot is a JavaScript-based Telegram bot designed to keep Minecraft servers running 24/7. It automates the process of maintaining an active player presence on Aternos servers, allowing users to control and manage the bot directly through a Telegram interface without needing direct server access or command-line interaction.
